# UnderCut — Formula 1 Data Companion

> Unofficial F1 statistics, live timing, and historical archives.
> Site: https://undercut.ge

## Languages

- English: /en/
- Spanish: /es/
- Georgian: /ka/

## Main sections

- `/en/` — Home dashboard with championship standings and season stats
- `/en/live` — Live race console (timing, weather, positions during sessions)
- `/en/f1/seasons` — Season archive (1950–present)
- `/en/f1/seasons/{year}` — Race calendar and results for a season
- `/en/f1/seasons/{year}/{round}` — Individual grand prix results and sessions
- `/en/f1/drivers` — Active and historical driver listings
- `/en/f1/drivers/{driverRef}` — Driver career profile (wins, poles, championships)
- `/en/f1/constructors` — Constructor/team listings
- `/en/f1/constructors/{constructorRef}` — Team profile (WCC/WDC titles, drivers, season history)
- `/en/f1/compare` — Telemetry comparison (beta)
- `/en/f1/circuits` — Circuit reference and track maps

## Data available

- Championship standings (drivers and constructors), updated after each classified race
- Race results, qualifying, sprint results (where applicable)
- Career statistics: wins, podiums, poles, points, championships
- Historical season data from 1950 onward (coverage varies by season)
- Live session data during race weekends (positions, lap count, weather)

## Public API endpoints

- `GET /api/live/status` — Current live/weekend/off-season mode
- `GET /api/live/weather` — Track weather for active session
- `GET /api/telemetry/sessions` — Available telemetry sessions
- `GET /api/telemetry/compare` — Lap telemetry comparison data
- `GET /api/circuits/{ref}/map` — Circuit SVG track map

## Sitemap

https://undercut.ge/sitemap.xml

See /llms-full.txt for extended page inventory and data schema notes.
